name: sroose-plugins
description: Sroose's Claude Code plugins. Install with `/plugin marketplace add Sroose/claude-plugins` then `/plugin install <plugin>@sroose-plugins`.

plugins.name: agent-bus
plugins.description: Message bus between Claude Code sessions on the same machine. Register a name and exchange messages with other named sessions, with auto-rebind on /resume and pre-filtered notifications.

plugins.name: confluence-sync
plugins.description: Workflow for keeping Markdown shadow files in sync with Confluence Cloud pages. Read-only against Confluence; manages local snapshots and pre-edit checkpoints; triages deviations on close. User applies changes manually in the Confluence editor.

plugins.name: better-statusline
plugins.description: Status line showing model, 5-hour and weekly rate-limit usage with resets, context-window %, and working directory. Ships /better-statusline:apply to wire it into ~/.claude/settings.json.

plugins.name: jira-fetch
plugins.description: Read-only fetch of Jira Cloud issues to Markdown. Downloads an issue (key, metadata, description, comments) as a Markdown file for reference while you work. Sibling of confluence-sync: same session-cookie auth and HTML->Markdown pipeline, one-way, never writes to Jira.

plugins.name: whisper-transcribe
plugins.description: Transcribe meeting/audio recordings via a whisper.cpp server (local, LAN, or tailnet) and write a concise, context-aware summary. Context can be files or an inline --context-text "..." string. Asks for the server URL on first use - no hardcoded host. Ships /transcribe <recording> [--prompt "vocab"] [--lang xx] [--context-text "..."] [context.md ...].
